_comment_transport: stages.transport=true copies each BuildPlugin package into <test_project>/Plugins/<plugin>, then editor_smoke/automation/sample_scan run against test_project. GUARDRAIL: <test_project>/Plugins MUST be git-ignored ('/Plugins' in .gitignore) or transport FAILS. test_branch (optional): the gate REFUSES if the test project is on a different branch (branch-per-plugin model). Use crossbuild=false for a Blueprint-only test project (plugin binaries are precompiled by buildplugin).
_comment_editor_timeout: editor_stage_timeout_s bounds editor-launch stages (editor_smoke/automation/automation_full/sample_scan). Editor stages exit via -TestExit when the automation queue drains; this is the safety net if that never fires (a wedged editor fails in minutes, not the 2h build timeout). Build/crossbuild keep stage_timeout_s.
_comment_platform: Windows example for PluginProjectGit. WSL/Linux: RunUAT.sh and Engine/Binaries/Linux/UnrealEditor-Cmd
